finding_results.notes: Two targeted edits roughen the deck debate. (1) Tommy's thesis-speech at line 215 is broken mid-sentence by Cliff cutting in ('They're divorced, Tommy'), giving both a Cliff/Tommy cut-off and Tommy's audible restart at line 219. Cliff's aphoristic 'Not a burial plot' replaced with self-correcting speech ('She's a grown woman who made a—I'm saying Joel doesn't own her') at line 221. (2) Nate's clean 'penalty structure' tag replaced at line 233 with an overshooting attempt that trails off before Tommy interrupts him at line 235. All three acceptance-test requirements met: audible interruption/restart (Tommy at 215/219), Nate overshoot/trail-off (233), Cliff/Tommy cut-off (215/217). Remaining Cliff lines in the later Mallick debate preserve his character-appropriate smoothness without crossing into quotable aphorism.

summary: Roughened the post-reveal deck debate in two spots to break composed, set-piece dialogue into pressured speech. Tommy's thesis-speech is interrupted by Cliff and restarts choppier; Cliff's epigrammatic lines are replaced with self-correcting speech; Nate's penalty-structure tag becomes an overshooting fumble that Tommy cuts off. All payoffs, must-land beats, and character voice signatures preserved.
